# Qa Prompt Create Test Case From Requirement

## Goal

- Define the primary objective clearly.

## Input

- [SOURCE_TEXT]
- [TARGET_FILE]
- [CONTEXT]

## Constraints

- Be explicit and deterministic.
- Do not assume missing facts.

## Expected Output

- Format: bullet list
- Include actionable results
